zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Orreby於1216年出生在英國爾加福斯沃斯時，她的父親Philip de Orreby II26歲，母親Leuca de Mohaut14歲。她和Roger de Macclesfield至少有3個兒子。她去世於大約1295年在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Orreby was born in 1216, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, her father, Philip de Orreby II, was 26 and her mother, Leuca de Mohaut, was 14. She had at least 3 sons with Roger de Macclesfield. She died about 1295, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Orreby est née en 1216, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Orreby II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Leuca de Mohaut, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Roger de Macclesfield. Elle est décédée environ 1295, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Orreby(이)가 1216년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Orreby II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Leuca de Mohaut(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Macclesfield(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Orreby родилась в 1216 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip de Orreby II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Leuca de Mohaut, 14.
